prestazioni: Replace the original Blue Flame inline-six (engine code: 'Chevrolet Blue Flame 235') with a fully built 383ci stroker small-block Chevy (SBC) featuring a forged crankshaft (Callies Compstar 4340), forged H-beam connecting rods (Eagle Specialty Products), and forged aluminum pistons (JE Pistons, 10.5:1 compression). Pair with a custom camshaft (Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H, 248°/254° duration, .501/.510 lift) and ported/polished cylinder heads (Edelbrock Performer RPM, 2.02/1.60 valves).

Install a custom forced-induction system using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR North America) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system (Stainless Works, 304-grade, mandrel-bent) terminating in dual 4-inch outlets with Borla Pro XS mufflers. Manage boost with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and a custom fuel system featuring dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors.

Upgrade the suspension with a full coilover conversion (RideTech HQ Series, adjustable damping) paired with a custom front sway bar (Addco, 1.25-inch diameter) and rear sway bar (Hellwig, 1-inch diameter). Replace the stock drum brakes with a Wilwood 6-piston front brake kit (13-inch rotors) and a 4-piston rear kit (12-inch rotors), using DOT 4 fluid (Motul RBF660) and stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Replace the factory fiberglass body with a custom carbon fiber widebody kit (RK Sport, C1-specific) featuring flared fenders, a custom front splitter (AeroCatch mounting), and a rear diffuser (custom 3D-printed, ABS plastic). Paint the body in a custom 'Midnight Sapphire Metallic' (PPG, DBC basecoat) with a matte clear coat (Spies Hecker Permasolid).

Install a custom interior with full Alcantara upholstery (Rostra Automotive) including a 3-inch thick Alcantara-wrapped steering wheel (Nardi Classic, 15-inch diameter) and custom bucket seats (Corbeau GTS II, FIA-approved). Add a custom gauge cluster (Speedhut, 5-inch diameter, white-faced with blue LED backlighting) and a retro-modern infotainment system (Pioneer AVH-W4500NEX, hidden in the glovebox).

Upgrade the lighting with custom LED headlights (Lux Customs, H4 conversion, 6000K) and sequential LED taillights (United Pacific, C1-specific housing). Add a custom underglow kit (Oracle Lighting, SMD5, deep blue) with a wireless controller (Oracle Bluetooth) and a custom license plate frame (Rally Armor, red lettering on black).
